title: Aframax Dirty tonne days
summary:
Main
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 21, May 23, 2024
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-05-24 105017.png | assets/2024-05-24_aframax-dirty-tonne-days_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_f577e0e396b3.png
The third week of May saw an upward trend in market prices for the Aframax Mediterranean market, while sentiment in the VLCC MEG-China route showed a gradual improvement. However, the increasing supply of vessels continues to challenge market price performance. On the demand side, there is no firm growth in tonne-days.

OCR text:
Chart of the Week: Aframax Dirty tonne days
This week's chart underscores the declining trend in Aframax tonne-days growth, it recently
fallen to levels below those of last year. Back in February, we highlighted the growth
recorded from the Mediterranean/UK Continent to the Baltic/Black Sea.
